mapper.select: SELECT * FROM notifications WHERE user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY created_at DESC
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM notifications WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND is_read = FALSE
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO notifications (user_id, type, title, message, content_format, is_read, created_at) VALUES (#{userId}, #{type}, #{title}, #{message}, #{contentFormat}, #{isRead}, #{createdAt})

INSERT INTO notifications (user_id, type, title, message, content_format, is_read, created_at) VALUES
(#{item.userId}, #{item.type}, #{item.title}, #{item.message}, #{item.contentFormat}, #{item.isRead}, #{item.createdAt})
mapper.update: UPDATE notifications SET is_read = TRUE WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE notifications SET is_read = TRUE WHERE user_id = #{userId}
